auth_env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_id for the integration. Used by the auth login flow to exchange for a bearer token at https://auth.servicetitan.io/connect/token. Whitespace is stripped defensively.

auth_env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_SECRET
auth_env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_secret paired with ST_CLIENT_ID. Whitespace is stripped defensively (a known JKA env gotcha that produced opaque invalid_client 400s).

novel_features.name: Renewal pipeline
novel_features.description: List active memberships whose to-date is within a window so the renewal task is one click away.

novel_features.name: Expiring soon
novel_features.description: Every membership whose to-date falls inside a window, including already-cancelled, for lapse-recovery sweeps.

novel_features.name: Overdue events
novel_features.description: Recurring-service events past their date on still-active memberships — what we should have already visited.

novel_features.name: Upcoming schedule
novel_features.description: Compact view of upcoming recurring-service events grouped by date and location.

novel_features.name: Template drift audit
novel_features.description: Compares each active membership's recurring-services against the membership-type template, flags missing or extra services.

novel_features.name: Churn risk
novel_features.description: Rule-engine score per membership: follow-up status, no payment method, lapsed bills, stale events, near to-date.

novel_features.name: Recurring revenue
novel_features.description: Monthly recurring revenue from memberships joined to membership-types.durationBilling, broken down by business unit and billing frequency.

novel_features.name: Memberships health
novel_features.description: One compact rollup of renewals, overdue events, drift, risk, stale services, and revenue-at-risk counts.

novel_features.name: Stale recurring services
novel_features.description: Recurring services on active memberships with no completed event in N or more months, even when the recurrence says one should have happened.

novel_features.name: Bill preview
novel_features.description: Show the next bill date and line-item amount for a single membership, resolved through its membership-type duration-billing.

novel_features.name: Event quick-complete
novel_features.description: Mark a recurring-service event complete with a required job link, then refresh the local snapshot so overdue filters update.

novel_features.name: Natural-language member finder
novel_features.description: Forgiving ranked search over synced memberships using customer, importId, memo, customFields, and membership-type name.
